title: Lunar
body:
The Lunar mod adds lunar events to the world of Minecraft.

The mod currently adds the following lunar events:

-   **Bad Omen Moon**: For the duration of the event every player will have the Bad Omen effect applied. So watch out if you live near a village!
-   **Big Moon**: The moon is closer than ever and is affecting gravity. Every entity will be more affected by gravity
-   **Blood Moon**: When this event is active prepare for fiercer battles. Mobs that emerge during this event hit way harder than normal, so don't underestimate them
-   **Crimson Moon**: The moon has changed... The Nether is leaking into the Overworld? During this event certain nether mobs will overtake vanilla mob spawning in the Overworld
-   **Hero Moon**: You're a hero! For the duration of the event every player will have the Hero Of The Village effect applied
-   **Miner Moon**: Unleash your inner miner. For the duration of the event every player will have the Haste effect applied, allowing you to strip mine even faster
-   **Tiny Moon**: The moon has drifted further away and the gravitational effects can be felt. Every player is less affected by gravity, almost like your jumping with slow falling
-   **White Moon**: You feel safer somehow. During this event mobs classified as Monster will not naturally spawn. Have fun exploring at night!
-   **Eclipse Moon:** The moon is dark? During this event players will have a tough time when being in direct sight of the moon. Having sky access will apply the Darkness effect to players making it difficult to traverse the world
